# ============================================================================
# Validation Tests for MPFloat
# ============================================================================
#
# This builds the validation runner that tests MPFloat operations against
# high-precision reference data generated by generate_test_data.py
#
# To generate test data:
#   python3 generate_test_data.py --precision 100 -o test_data_100d.bin
#
# To run validation:
#   ./run_validation test_data_100d.bin --verbose
#
# ============================================================================

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.16)

# Add validation runner executable
add_executable(run_validation run_validation.cpp)

target_link_libraries(run_validation PRIVATE mpfun::mpfun)

target_include_directories(run_validation PRIVATE
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}
)

# C++17 for structured bindings and constexpr lambdas
target_compile_features(run_validation PRIVATE cxx_std_17)

# Optimization for validation runner
if(CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE STREQUAL "Release")
    target_compile_options(run_validation PRIVATE -O3)
endif()

# ============================================================================
# Custom target to generate test data
# ============================================================================

# Find Python
find_package(Python3 COMPONENTS Interpreter)

if(Python3_FOUND)
    # Custom command to generate 100-digit test data
    add_custom_command(
        OUTPUT ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/test_data_100d.bin
        COMMAND ${Python3_EXECUTABLE} ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/generate_test_data.py
                --precision 100
                --output ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/test_data_100d.bin
        DEPENDS ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/generate_test_data.py
        WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}
        COMMENT "Generating 100-digit test data..."
    )
    
    # Custom target to generate test data
    add_custom_target(generate_test_data
        DEPENDS ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/test_data_100d.bin
        COMMENT "Test data generation complete"
    )
    
    # Custom target to run validation
    add_custom_target(validate
        COMMAND run_validation ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/test_data_100d.bin
        DEPENDS run_validation generate_test_data
        WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}
        COMMENT "Running MPFloat validation..."
    )
    
    # Multiple precision levels
    foreach(PRECISION 100 200 500 1000)
        add_custom_command(
            OUTPUT ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/test_data_${PRECISION}d.bin
            COMMAND ${Python3_EXECUTABLE} ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/generate_test_data.py
                    --precision ${PRECISION}
                    --output ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/test_data_${PRECISION}d.bin
            DEPENDS ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/generate_test_data.py
            WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}
            COMMENT "Generating ${PRECISION}-digit test data..."
        )
        
        add_custom_target(generate_test_data_${PRECISION}d
            DEPENDS ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/test_data_${PRECISION}d.bin
        )
        
        add_custom_target(validate_${PRECISION}d
            COMMAND run_validation ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/test_data_${PRECISION}d.bin --verbose
            DEPENDS run_validation generate_test_data_${PRECISION}d
            WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}
            COMMENT "Running ${PRECISION}-digit validation..."
        )
    endforeach()
else()
    message(WARNING "Python3 not found - test data generation targets disabled")
endif()

# ============================================================================
# Installation
# ============================================================================

# Install the validation runner
install(TARGETS run_validation
    RUNTIME DESTINATION bin
)

# Install the Python generator script
install(FILES generate_test_data.py
    DESTINATION share/mpfun/validation
    PERMISSIONS OWNER_READ OWNER_WRITE OWNER_EXECUTE 
                GROUP_READ GROUP_EXECUTE 
                WORLD_READ WORLD_EXECUTE
)
